name: Imperva Data Security
description: Integrates with Imperva (Thales) Data Activity Monitoring (DAM) REST API for database audit events, security policy management, and compliance monitoring across relational databases, mainframes, and data warehouses

actions.name: List Audit Events
actions.description: Retrieve database audit events including SQL queries, access attempts, and policy violations

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for audit event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for audit event query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

actions.name: List Security Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all configured database security policies including audit, firewall, and assessment policies

parameters.name: policyType
parameters.description: Filter by policy type (db-audit, db-security, assessment)

actions.name: Get Policy Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed configuration of a specific security policy

actions.name: List Data Sources
actions.description: Retrieve all monitored database servers and services registered in Imperva DAM

actions.name: Search Database Activity
actions.description: Search database activity logs for specific queries, users, or data access patterns

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: SQL-like search query for activity logs

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: List Security Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve database security alerts triggered by policy violations or anomalous activity

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by alert severity (high, medium, low)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for alert query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for alert query (ISO 8601 format)
